description_long: This kiosk features a wide, rectangular structure with a prominent front display area, including a large central graphic of a woman with headphones and a digital sign above. The kiosk is set on a wood-patterned platform and is flanked by metallic or composite paneling with blue accent borders. The rear side displays a large graphic of headphones and a slogan, while the sides are enclosed with matching panels. The upper section includes a horizontal canopy-like element, possibly for lighting or additional signage. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a focus on visual merchandising. There are no visible windows or doors, and the kiosk appears to be intended for product display or promotional use in public spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with blue accents, large front and rear graphics, and a wood-patterned base, designed for product display or promotion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display area with a large graphic of a woman, digital signage above, and a presenter figure for scale.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the wood-patterned platform, and the side paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large headphone graphic and slogan, with metallic paneling and blue accents.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the enclosed side panels and the flat, extended roof structure.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and digital signage; large printed graphics on front and rear panels, digital display above the main front graphic, all signage integrated into the kiosk structure.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a horizontal canopy element, constructed from metal or composite material, no visible overhangs or decorative features.
